skill_availability_goal: Verify an unconfirmed API backfill request is routed through evidence-based hierarchy and per-node candidate-scope confirmation before any write or audit handoff.
prompt: 维护者通过 `pm-handoff.md` 请求为当前既有文档站回填 API，但 `backfill-request.md` 只授权 bounded discovery，不是候选批次确认。请读取 fixture 的 feature catalog、现有 change map、route/schema/handler 与 contract tests，按正式同步协议的候选确认结构提出第一批有限范围供维护者确认。本轮不要替维护者确认范围，也不要写入文档站。
